text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the second battle of our Triple Tiara
tour—the Japanese Oaks. As usual, Fine Motion
seems entirely unfazed by the race ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume who was struggling back at the
Oka Sho notes that Fine Motion doesn't get
nervous because she always has another path
ahead of her even if she loses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion doesn't deny it. Free from anxiety,
she enjoys herself no matter which race she runs
in. That said, she understands how important this
race is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, her time here is limited... And
that's precisely why she won't hold anything back,
and why she wants the competition to run their
best too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's candid feelings remind the other
Umamusume to run her own way. And so, the race
begins...
